channels.name: 3Blue1Brown
channels.video_analyzed: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image

ai_reasoning.research_depth: References specific academic work (De Smit and Lenstra 2003), primary source materials (Escher's letter to his son), deep understanding of math and art history.
ai_reasoning.signal_noise: Every sentence advances understanding with zero filler. No sponsors, no padding, just dense conceptual progression.
ai_reasoning.originality: Signature pedagogical framework using animation to reveal mathematical insights in artwork. Highly distinctive approach.
ai_reasoning.lasting_impact: Explains timeless mathematical concepts (self-similarity, logarithmic transformations) through enduring artwork.

channels.name: Kurzgesagt - In a Nutshell
channels.video_analyzed: The Most Insane Megaproject You Never Heard About

ai_reasoning.research_depth: Deep knowledge of Project Plowshare with specific technical details, dates, locations. Precise quantitative data throughout.
ai_reasoning.signal_noise: Extremely content-dense with no filler. Efficient storytelling moving chronologically without padding.
ai_reasoning.originality: Distinctive narrative style mixing dark humor with education. Fresh angle on lesser-known Cold War topic.
ai_reasoning.lasting_impact: Important but obscure historical episode. Lessons about technological overreach remain relevant.

channels.name: Mark Rober
channels.video_analyzed: Engineers vs Junkyard RC Car Death Match

ai_reasoning.research_depth: No research, citations, or technical depth—live-action RC car competition with engineering references but no actual analysis.
ai_reasoning.signal_noise: Decent entertainment-to-filler ratio but includes sponsor plugs and repetitive banter.
ai_reasoning.originality: Creative competition format combining RC cars with engineered weaponry. Distinct from standard formats.
ai_reasoning.lasting_impact: Pure entertainment content with no educational takeaways or timeless insights.

channels.note: Large delta likely due to video selection — this is an entertainment video, not a typical Mark Rober explainer. Manual scores reflect channel average.

summary.conclusion: AI scores align well for content-heavy channels (3B1B: perfect match, Kurzgesagt: ±1). Entertainment-focused videos underperform vs channel-level manual scores. Mitigation: analyze 2-3 videos per channel and average, or select educational videos specifically.
summary.recommendation: Proceed to Phase 2 with multi-video averaging. Exclude production criterion from AI scoring.
